subject: Re: Fwd: Libor rates
body:
30day

> The $50 MM traunch of the outstanding balance of the
> Bank One line came due  
> today.  Please advise how you wish for us to
> proceed.
>  
> Darren K.  Indyke
> Attorney-At-Law
> 457 Madison Avenue
> 4th Floor
